attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_LOG_ID, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.XXCCP_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.XXCCP_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.QUOTE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.QUOTE_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.WEB_ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ORDER_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ORDER_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.FOR_CSE_INTEGRATION, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_STAGE, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_SUB_STAGE, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.OPERATION_CODE, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN_ID, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.CHANGE_HISTORY_ID, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ENTITY, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ELEMENT_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG,
 (
 select ERROR_LOG_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG
 minus
 select ERROR_LOG_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ERROR_LOG_ID = STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.ERROR_LOG_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG)
